sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103139" key="te/reinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέρεινος</orth>, collat. form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέρην</foreign>, restored by Salmas. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">53.2</biblScope></bibl>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τερινόν</foreign>.</entryFree>
